description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-winged layout and a mix of gable and hip roof sections in black. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, and the house features numerous large windows, some arranged in symmetrical rows and others more asymmetrically. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a main door, flanked by tall windows and a paved landing. At the rear, there is a spacious patio area with a swimming pool and a circular outdoor seating area, surrounded by manicured landscaping. The house also includes a garage section and several roof elevations, giving it a dynamic architectural profile. The overall style blends modern and traditional elements, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with light gray walls, black gable and hip roofs, and extensive windows. Features include a prominent entryway, a rear patio with a pool, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, tall windows, and the primary facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage section, multiple roof elevations, and part of the rear patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio, swimming pool, and circular outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional roof sections, windows, and the connection to the outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical rows and asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a paved landing, tall windows, and a simple overhang
